sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: WisdomTree Voya Yield Enhanced USD Universal Bond Fund (UNIY) Dividend Yield 2026 & History
feed.summary: This article provides details on the WisdomTree Voya Yield Enhanced USD Universal Bond Fund (UNIY), including its current dividend yield of 4.91% and an annual dividend of $2.38 per share. It outlines the fund's recent dividend payments and historical data, comparing its performance to general Finance and NASDAQ companies. The article also includes a detailed dividend history table, frequently asked questions about UNIY's dividends, and related investment resources.

feed.title: Desjardins Cuts TELUS (TSE:T) Price Target to C$21.50
feed.summary: Desjardins has lowered its price target for TELUS (TSE:T) to C$21.50 from C$23.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 23% upside. Several other brokerage firms have also trimmed their targets or downgraded TELUS, resulting in a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Hold" with a C$21.00 price target. The stock is currently trading around C$17.46, below analyst targets, and the company exhibits high leverage with a debt-to-equity ratio of approximately 199.42.

feed.title: TFI International (TSE:TFII) Price Target Raised to C$144.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for TFI International (TSE:TFII) to C$144.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, although this new target still suggests a potential downside from its current share price. Other analysts, including Desjardins, Scotiabank, and National Bank, have also increased their price targets, leading to a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" with a C$156.00 target. The company recently reported C$1.50 EPS and C$2.51 billion in revenue for its latest quarter, and is a transportation and logistics company organized into four segments.

feed.title: Supply Chain Management Software with Agentic AI to Reach $53B in Spend by 2030: Gartner
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that supply chain management (SCM) software with agentic AI capabilities will see a massive increase in spending, growing from under $2 billion in 2025 to $53 billion by 2030. This growth is driven by the ability of simple AI agents to automate routine tasks, freeing human resources for more complex work and leading to increased enterprise adoption of agentic AI features in SCM software. By 2030, 60% of enterprises using SCM software are expected to have adopted agentic AI features, a significant jump from 5% in 2025.

feed.title: CINF: Analyst Meyer Shields Lowers Price Target While Maintaining Rating
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods analyst Meyer Shields has maintained an "Outperform" rating for Cincinnati Financial (CINF) but slightly lowered the price target from $191.00 to $190.00. This adjustment reflects continued confidence in the company's performance, despite the minor price target reduction. Cincinnati Financial, a property and casualty insurance company, generates most of its revenue from commercial and personal lines of insurance.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Has Lowered Expectations for KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) Stock Price
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) from $145 to $110, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 22% upside. Despite the lowered target, the consensus analyst rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $141.20, and company insiders have recently purchased a significant number of shares. This news comes as KKR's stock traded down $0.88 to $90.17 on Tuesday, with a market capitalization of $80.39 billion.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Lowers Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) Price Target to $27.00
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) from $30.00 to $27.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating, which implies an 18.9% upside from its previous close. Invesco shares are currently trading at $22.72, below the average analyst target of $28.04, with a market cap of approximately $10.08 billion. Despite beating Q4 EPS estimates and a 6.1% year-over-year revenue increase, Invesco reported a negative net margin of -6.92% and a debt-to-equity ratio of 1.04.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman requests environmental permit for Waynesboro facility
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman has submitted an environmental emissions permit application for its new Waynesboro facility, which is currently under construction and could employ up to 330 people. The draft permit limits emissions of individual compounds to 9.9 tons per year and combined emissions to 24.9 tons per year. The public comment period for this permit application closes on April 13.

feed.title: [424B2] TORONTO DOMINION BANK Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: The Toronto-Dominion Bank (TD) is offering Callable Contingent Interest Barrier Notes linked to the least performing of the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Nasdaq-100 Index, and Russell 2000 Index. These notes have a principal amount of $1,000, a contingent interest rate of 9.60% per annum, and mature on April 16, 2027. Contingent interest is paid monthly only if each index's closing value on the observation date is at least 60.00% of its initial value, and TD may call the notes monthly starting on the third interest payment date.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Neutral Rating on IVZ, Lowers Price Target to $27 | IVZ Stock News
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has maintained a 'Neutral' rating for Invesco (IVZ) but lowered its price target by 10% from $30 to $27. This adjustment aligns with similar revisions from other analysts, although some ratings have been more optimistic. Invesco, a significant investment management firm with $2.258 trillion in AUM, sees an average analyst price target of $29.83, suggesting a 31.08% upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a 32.73% downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: F-1/A
feed.summary: BBB Foods Inc. has filed Amendment No. 1 to their Form F-1 Registration Statement with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, detailing their initial public offering of 28,050,491 Class A common shares. The estimated IPO price is between US$14.50 and US$16.50 per share, with plans to list on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol "TBBB". The company, a hard discount grocery retailer in Mexico, intends to use the net proceeds to repay indebtedness and for general corporate purposes, including expansion.

feed.title: SPYX Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:SPYX
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive information on the SPYX State Street SPDR S&P 500 Fossil Fuel Reserves Free ETF, including its current price, NAV, AUM, and historical performance. It details the fund's investment strategy, which involves divesting from companies holding fossil fuel reserves, and offers technical analysis, seasonal trends, and answers to frequently asked questions about the ETF.

feed.title: Trinity Capital (TRIN) Is Up 5.4% After Earnings Beat And New Dwelly Commitment Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Trinity Capital (TRIN) recently announced its Q4 2025 earnings, reporting US$0.52 per share on US$83.24 million in revenue, along with a US$50 million growth capital commitment to Dwelly. A director's share purchase further signals confidence. These developments, particularly the Dwelly commitment, suggest Trinity Capital is actively deploying capital and reinforce its growth-stage lending strategy, although the focus remains on credit quality and the evolving venture funding environment.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) Anchors Aggregates Supply Chain in Russell 1000 Index
feed.summary: Vulcan Materials (NYSE:VMC) is a key player in the construction aggregates and materials sector, anchoring the supply chain for infrastructure projects. Its operations, including quarrying, processing, and logistics, are integral to its role within the industrial segment of the Russell 1000 Index. The article highlights VMC's position in this critical market.

feed.title: Meta Vs. SMCI: 1 AI Trade, 2 Risk Profiles
feed.summary: This article compares Meta Platforms (META) and Super Micro Computer (SMCI) as AI trade opportunities, highlighting their distinct risk profiles. SMCI is presented as a high-beta, volatile play tied to cyclical AI-server demand and subject to headline risks, while Meta offers a steadier growth path through incremental AI improvements across its broad ecosystem. The piece suggests that investors seeking AI exposure can choose between SMCI's high torque and volatility or Meta's smoother, more liquid compounder profile.

feed.title: Mega-deals drive Q1 digital health funding to $4B
feed.summary: Digital health companies secured $4 billion in funding in Q1 2026, marking a $1 billion increase from the previous year. This surge was primarily fueled by 12 "mega-deals," each exceeding $100 million, including significant investments in Whoop, Talkiatry, and OpenEvidence. Despite geopolitical risks and market volatility, growth was observed in AI and direct-to-consumer digital health sectors, alongside a rise in mergers and acquisitions.

feed.title: Nutanix-NetApp tie-up aims to cut VM migration to minutes
feed.summary: Nutanix (NASDAQ: NTNX) and NetApp (NASDAQ: NTAP) have formed a strategic alliance to integrate NetApp ONTAP enterprise storage with the Nutanix Cloud Platform (NCP) and AHV hypervisor, with availability expected later in 2026. This collaboration aims to simplify VM migration, enable VM-granular operations, separate compute and storage scaling, and enhance built-in ransomware resilience. The companies also plan further integration with Nutanix Agentic AI and support for FlexPod with Cisco.

feed.title: Why Are Dollar Tree Shares Trading Down On Tuesday?
feed.summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) shares are trading lower on Tuesday due to a broader market sell-off influenced by weak economic data and heightened geopolitical tensions. The consumer discretionary sector is facing headwinds, and a decline in U.S. durable goods orders further contributed to the bearish sentiment. Technical analysis shows the stock trading below its 20-day and 100-day simple moving averages.

feed.title: Merck Lowered Terns Pharmaceuticals Offer Price After Trial Data Review
feed.summary: Merck lowered its offer price for Terns Pharmaceuticals to $53.00 per share after reviewing updated clinical data for Terns' lead drug TERN-701. The updated data from the CARDINAL trial showed a lower MMR achievement rate, particularly relevant due to the increased proportion of patients pre-treated with asciminib. Despite the adjustment, Merck still considers the data compelling relative to asciminib and remains enthusiastic about the acquisition.

feed.title: BNY Mellon (BK) reports 1.63M shares, 68.9% of Genter Capital ETF
feed.summary: BNY Mellon (BK) has reported beneficial ownership of 1,632,827 shares, equating to 68.9% of the Genter Capital Municipal Quality Intermediate ETF, through an amended Schedule 13G/A filing. The filing details that BNY Mellon entities hold significant voting and dispositive powers, with 1,628,706 shares having sole voting power. The disclosure specifies that the securities are held in various fiduciary capacities, and the filing explicitly disclaims that BNY Mellon acts as a beneficial owner for the purposes of Section 13(d) or 13(g).

feed.title: Coca-Cola unveils collectible mini cans for America's 250th birthday
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is celebrating America's 250th birthday by releasing collectible mini cans with designs unique to each of the 50 states, Puerto Rico, and Washington D.C. These special cans, along with custom bottles, are part of a larger campaign to connect consumers with interactive experiences, encourage exploration of the country, and inspire optimism for the future. The initiative will also include other Coca-Cola brands, a "Paint the Nation" public art project, and substantial volunteer hours.

feed.title: Coca-Cola unveils collectible mini cans for America's 250th birthday
feed.summary: Coca-Cola is releasing a collection of America250 collectible mini cans and custom bottles to celebrate America's 250th birthday. Each mini can will feature a unique design representing one of the 50 states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia, connecting consumers to interactive experiences and prizes. This initiative celebrates Coca-Cola's long history in the US and includes a "Drink in America" campaign, volunteer hours, and a public art initiative.

feed.title: UBS Request to Amend Holocaust-Related Settlement Denied by Court
feed.summary: A court has denied UBS's request to amend a Holocaust-related settlement. The article does not provide further details on what amendment was sought or the specific context of the original settlement.

feed.title: Church & Dwight stock: Trading at a potential 10% discount – what investors need to know
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (CHD) stock is potentially undervalued by about 10% at around $93, with fair value estimates pushing towards $104. The company, a consumer staples leader with brands like Arm & Hammer and OxiClean, offers stability and growth through its strong market position, increasing online sales (23% of global revenue), and consistent financial performance. Despite a premium P/E ratio, analysts maintain a largely neutral to positive outlook, citing the company's resilience, growth drivers, and consistent dividend as key attractions for investors.

feed.title: Raymond James (NASDAQ: WATT) reports 122,068 shares, 5.6% stake
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial Services Advisors has reported a beneficial ownership of 122,068 shares of Energous Corp (NASDAQ: WATT), which constitutes a 5.6% stake in the company. This disclosure was made in a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating a passive investment where Raymond James holds sole dispositive power but no voting power over the shares. The filing highlights transparency in ownership and financial control without implying intent to influence company management.

feed.title: Toll Brothers Announces Final Opportunity for Luxury Living at Toll Brothers at StoneCreek in Richmond, Texas
feed.summary: Toll Brothers, Inc. announced the final opportunity to purchase a luxury home at Toll Brothers at StoneCreek in Richmond, Texas, with only a limited number of quick move-in homes remaining. This community offers elegant home designs, resort-style amenities, and convenient access to schools, shopping, dining, and downtown Houston. Brian Murray, Division President, emphasized that this is the last chance for home shoppers to join the sought-after neighborhood.

feed.title: Only a few new luxury homes remain at Richmond's StoneCreek
feed.summary: Toll Brothers has announced the final opportunity to purchase luxury homes at their StoneCreek community in Richmond, Texas, with a limited number of quick move-in homes still available. These homes range from 2,941 to 3,813 sq ft and are priced from the mid-$600,000s, offering resort-style amenities and convenient access to Houston. The announcement highlights the community's elegant designs, family-friendly environment, and strategic location.

feed.title: The App Killer: How 'Agentic AI' Is Turning Your Smartphone Into A Digital Employee
feed.summary: Counterpoint Research analysts highlight Agentic AI as the next phase in technology, shifting computing to on-device, action-driven experiences and minimizing the need for traditional apps. This autonomous AI acts proactively, learns from its environment, and adapts to complex tasks with minimal supervision, unlike generative AI which mainly responds. Qualcomm and other tech giants are driving this shift by optimizing models for efficient on-device AI experiences across various devices, improving privacy, security, and user control.

feed.title: Rumor Has It Costco Is Selling a 150-Inch TV, and People Have Questions
feed.summary: A TikTok video has sparked rumors that Costco is selling a massive 150-inch TV, leading many to question its authenticity. Investigations reveal that such a television is not listed on Costco's website or online, and the brand "Global Tech" featured in the video yields no relevant search results for TVs, suggesting the image might be AI-generated. While Costco currently sells up to 100-inch TVs, the 150-inch version appears to be a social media fabrication.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines, Constellation Brands and more set to report Wednesday
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines and Constellation Brands are among several companies scheduled to report their latest corporate results on Wednesday, April 8, 2026. The earnings season continues, with these companies providing insights into their operational and financial performance. Investors can find estimated EPS and revenue figures for Delta Air Lines, RPM International, Constellation Brands, Applied Blockchain, PriceSmart, Resources Connection, and Nexgel.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) Given New $246.00 Price Target at Keefe, Bruyette & Woods
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods has adjusted its price target for Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to $246.00, down from $249.00, while maintaining a "market perform" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 12.87% from the previous closing price. Other analysts have a more positive outlook, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and an average price target of $273.65 for AJG.

feed.title: Regency Centers (REG) chair reports 24,201-share gift via family trust
feed.summary: Regency Centers Executive Chairman Martin E. Stein Jr. reported charitable transfers of 24,201 shares of company stock through a Grantor Retained Annuity Trust (GRAT) established for his daughters. These bona fide gifts, made on three separate dates with the most recent on May 14, 2024, resulted in the trust's reported holdings of Regency Centers falling to zero. The filing also corrected a previous administrative error by including an additional 44,547 shares that were inadvertently omitted from an earlier Form 4.

feed.title: Boeing Delivers ViaSat-3 Satellite Ahead Of SpaceX Launch
feed.summary: Boeing (NYSE: BA) delivered its ViaSat-3 Flight 3 (VS-3 F3) spacecraft to Viasat, Inc. (NASDAQ: VSAT) for pre-launch processing at Cape Canaveral ahead of a SpaceX Falcon Heavy launch. This satellite is designed to expand connectivity in the Asia-Pacific region. Despite this milestone, Boeing shares were down as the broader market exhibited a "risk-off" sentiment, with technical indicators showing mixed signals for the stock.

feed.title: Barclays (ATMP) launches leveraged cyber-security basket notes with 15% buffer
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has launched leveraged, autocallable notes linked to an equally weighted basket of cybersecurity stocks: CRWD, MSFT, PANW, and SNOW. These notes offer a minimum Call Price of $1,238.70 per $1,000, and if not automatically called, provide leveraged upside at 1.25x for positive basket returns. A 15% buffer protects against limited declines, but losses below this buffer are leveraged at 1.17647x.

feed.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) Stock
feed.summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods increased its price target for Arch Capital Group (NASDAQ:ACGL) to $105, maintaining a "market perform" rating, suggesting an 8.09% upside. The insurance provider recently beat quarterly earnings expectations with an EPS of $2.98 and revenue of $4.93 billion. Despite positive financial results, the average analyst rating remains "Hold" with a consensus price target of $109.27, and company insiders have been net sellers, while institutional investors hold a significant portion of the stock.

feed.title: Leidos, Tyto Athene to lay off a combined 266 workers in Maryland
feed.summary: Defense contractors Leidos and Tyto Athene are planning to lay off a combined 266 employees in Maryland. This decision comes as the Department of Defense is changing its approach to working with contractors. The report highlights similar recent layoffs by other contractors in the region.

feed.title: Teledyne Flir OEM Announces Upgraded Prism Skr Software
feed.summary: Teledyne FLIR OEM, a part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated, has upgraded its Prism SKR software into a unified, closed-loop autonomy platform for guided weapon systems. This enhancement standardizes mission execution and intelligent supervision for systems such as smart munitions, ALE, counter-UAS platforms, and FPV drones. The software offers advanced features like 3D interactive aimpoint selection, terrain-aware operations, and pixel-lock targeting for precision in contested environments and supports various mission scenarios.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: This document details the offering of Uncapped Accelerated Barrier Notes Linked to the EURO STOXX 50® Index by JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC, with JPMorgan Chase & Co. acting as guarantor. The notes are designed for investors seeking uncapped returns tied to the index's appreciation but involve significant risks, including potential loss of principal. It outlines the structured investment's terms, hypothetical payouts, and various risk considerations for potential investors.

feed.title: Anthropic Lets Apple, Amazon Test More Powerful Mythos AI Model
feed.summary: Anthropic has granted early access to its unreleased Mythos AI model to tech giants like Apple and Amazon, as part of an initiative called Project Glasswing. This move aims to help these companies identify potential cyberattack vulnerabilities in their products before the advanced AI system becomes more broadly available. The participating firms will use Mythos to find flaws and share their findings with other industry players.

feed.title: Form FWP JPMorgan Chase Financial Filed by: JPMorgan Chase Financial Co. LLC
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Co. LLC has filed a Form FWP (Free Writing Prospectus) for its 3-year INDU/RTY/SPX Buffered Return Enhanced Notes. These notes are linked to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, offering an Upside Leverage Factor of at least 1.68 and a 10.00% buffer amount. The document details the terms, estimated value, payment at maturity scenarios, and various risks associated with the investment.

feed.title: TransDigm completes $2.2B aerospace parts acquisition
feed.summary: TransDigm Group Incorporated has finalized its acquisition of Jet Parts Engineering and Victor Sierra Aviation Holdings for approximately $2.2 billion in cash. This strategic move, financed by cash reserves and recent debt offerings, expands TransDigm's offerings in the aerospace aftermarket for commercial and business aviation. Despite the company's strong financial health, market analysts have expressed mixed sentiments regarding the acquisition's impact on future growth and margins.

feed.title: Stantec appoints new infrastructure leader
feed.summary: Stantec has appointed Arliss Szysky as executive vice president of its Infrastructure business in North America, its largest division. Szysky, previously operations leader for Stantec’s North American Buildings business, brings extensive operational expertise and a people-first leadership approach to the role. She will focus on expanding the transportation business, strengthening community development work, and collaborating across the company to ensure high-quality project delivery.
feed.source: REMI Network - Real Estate Management Industry Network
feed.source_domain: REMI Network - Real Estate Management Industry Network

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. Appoints Jonathan M. Vigdorchik as Chief Science, Technology and Medical Affairs Officer, Effective April 14, 2026
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. has announced the appointment of Jonathan M. Vigdorchik, M.D., as its new Chief Science, Technology and Medical Affairs Officer, effective April 14, 2026. In this role, Dr. Vigdorchik will be responsible for the strategy, delivery, and management of the company's global technology portfolio, including AI, robotics, smart implants, and data. He will also oversee Zimmer Biomet's Medical Education strategy and Global Advisory Board.

feed.title: PNC Bank, US Bank, Wells Fargo Sued Over Online Data Tracking
feed.summary: PNC Bank, US Bank, and Wells Fargo & Co. are facing separate proposed class-action lawsuits. The lawsuits allege that these banks illegally disclosed the financial data of their website visitors to third parties without consent, violating California privacy laws. The complaints detail that tracking technologies on the banks' websites allowed entities like Trade Desk Inc., LinkedIn Corp., Pinterest Inc., and Snap Inc. to collect data on consumers' financial circumstances and debt-related research interests.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] SunOpta Inc. Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: FIL Limited and affiliated entities have disclosed a passive investment in SunOpta Inc., beneficially owning 12,612,784 shares of Common Stock, which represents 10.7% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The Schedule 13G filing indicates that FIL Limited (Bermuda) has sole voting and dispositive power over these shares, with related entities Pandanus Partners, L.P. and Pandanus Associates, Inc. also identified in the ownership structure. The disclosure is a routine filing for significant passive institutional holdings.

feed.title: ONEOK (OKE) Stock: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target to $113 |
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its "Overweight" rating for ONEOK (OKE) and increased its price target to $113, an 8.65% rise from the previous $104. This update reflects a positive outlook on the company's performance and follows other recent analyst upgrades from firms like Wells Fargo and Jefferies. The average target price from 21 analysts for ONEOK is $91.96, suggesting a slight upside from its current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $97.72.

feed.title: T-Mobile’s Mint Launches New Bundles Targeting Cable
feed.summary: T-Mobile's Mint Mobile has introduced new "Unf*! Your Bills" bundles aimed at competing with cable company offerings, providing wireless and fixed wireless home broadband for $45 per month. This move follows AT&T's recent launch of its own fiber and phone line bundles. These initiatives highlight a growing trend among major ISPs to offer combined fixed and mobile services to reduce subscriber churn and challenge traditional cable operators.

feed.title: MGM Resorts stock: Upside Potential Amid Leisure Challenges – What Investors Need to Know
feed.summary: MGM Resorts (NYSE: MGM) shows upside potential despite Las Vegas Strip slowdowns, driven by robust digital growth via BetMGM and a recovery in Macau operations. Stifel analysts maintain a "buy" rating, emphasizing the company's diversified revenue streams and the strength of its non-Strip segments. Investors should monitor BetMGM's upcoming Q1 2026 update on April 14 and MGM's full Q1 earnings on April 29 for further catalysts.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (NASDAQ:KMB) Reaches New 52-Week Low - Should You Sell?
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) has hit a new 52-week low of $94.37, trading below its 50-day and 200-day moving averages. Analysts maintain a consensus "Hold" rating with an average price target of $115.85, though some have recently lowered their targets. Despite a revenue slip, the company beat its last quarter's EPS estimate and raised its quarterly dividend to $1.28, offering a 5.5% yield.

feed.title: Raymond James raises Charles Schwab stock price target on rates
feed.summary: Raymond James has increased its price target for Charles Schwab Corporation (NYSE: SCHW) to $128 from $121, maintaining an Outperform rating. The firm cites higher interest rates benefiting reinvestment and margin loan yields, despite a recent slowdown in net new asset growth. The stock is considered undervalued with a favorable risk/reward, trading at a low P/E ratio relative to near-term earnings growth.
